metadata.name: Schedule Wind Turbine Blade Leading Edge Erosion Repair

description: Drone inspections have revealed significant leading-edge erosion on several wind turbine blades, which reduces aerodynamic efficiency and energy production.

nodes.task_description: Review the drone inspection reports to identify all turbines with severe (Category 4 or 5) leading-edge erosion.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a list of 12 turbines requiring repair.

nodes.task_description: Estimate the annual energy production (AEP) loss caused by the erosion.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calculates that the erosion is causing a 2% AEP loss.

nodes.task_description: Obtain quotes from specialized contractors for leading-edge repair.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets quotes from three different repair companies.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the repair campaign, creating work orders and coordinating turbine downtime with grid operators.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a full project plan for the repair campaign.
